Category.description:
A single Category — declarative input for Phase 10's 6-app propagation.

Match key: ``name`` (kebab-case slug, stable across reconcile runs).
D-04 invariant: ``base_path`` MUST equal ``f"/media/{name}"``.

kind.description: Media kind — drives Sonarr vs Radarr propagation.
kind.title: Kind

profile.description: Quality profile group — drives configarr profile selection (Phase 10) and Seerr animeTags routing for profile=anime.
profile.title: Profile

Category.title: Category

CrossSeedConfig.description: Configuration block for the cross-seed tool (XSEED, INTENT-01).

data_dirs.description: Dirs scanned for data-based matching (library re-seed, no client torrent).
data_dirs.title: Data Dirs

exclude_older.description: Skip searchees first seen older than this (2-5x exclude_recent_search).
exclude_older.title: Exclude Older

exclude_recent_search.description: Skip searchees searched more recently than this; required w/ search_cadence.
exclude_recent_search.title: Exclude Recent Search

max_data_depth.description: Max directory depth when scanning data_dirs. None = cross-seed default.
max_data_depth.title: Max Data Depth

search_cadence.description: Scheduled daemon search interval (e.g. '1 day'). None = no scheduled search.
search_cadence.title: Search Cadence

skip_recheck.description: Skip recheck before seeding matches. None = cross-seed default (true).
skip_recheck.title: Skip Recheck

CrossSeedConfig.title: CrossSeedConfig

CustomFormatRef.description:
One custom_format reference inside a profile_definition (D-33-06).

trash_id references a TRaSH-Guides id OR a local CF defined in the configarr
pass-through block's customFormatDefinitions. score is optional; when omitted
the CF's own default score (from its definition) applies at configarr apply time.

score.description: Per-profile score override. None → use CF default score.
score.title: Score

trash_ids.description: CF ids (TRaSH or local) sharing the same per-profile score.
trash_ids.title: Trash Ids

CustomFormatRef.title: CustomFormatRef

ProfileDefinition.description:
A reusable quality-profile body, written once per profile name (D-33-01/02).

body: the QP fields emitted verbatim into configarr quality_profiles
(language, reset_unmatched_scores, upgrade, min_format_score, quality_sort,
qualities). Carried as dict[str, Any] — configarr validates at apply time,
arrconf does NOT (ADR-5: arrconf-ui models must not be imported here).
custom_formats: structured so generate emits assign_scores_to per profile.
ProfileDefinition.title: ProfileDefinition

SagaEntry.description:
A single saga declaration (Phase 29 locked schema — D-02).

kind=movies: tmdb_collection REQUIRED; profile + root REQUIRED; items ignored.
kind=series: items OPTIONAL (titles of member series); profile/root/tmdb_collection not used.

items.description: Series titles for Jellyfin BoxSet membership. kind=series only.
items.title: Items

name.description: Saga display name; also the Jellyfin BoxSet name for series.
name.title: Name

profile.description: Radarr quality profile name. Required when kind=movies.
profile.title: Profile

root.description: Radarr root folder path. Required when kind=movies.
root.title: Root

tmdb_collection.description: TMDB collection id. Required when kind=movies.
tmdb_collection.title: Tmdb Collection

SagaEntry.title: SagaEntry

name.description: Group name (also used as qbit_manage group key).
name.title: Name

tag.description: Tag to apply to matching torrents.
tag.title: Tag

description:
Root schema for intent.yml (INTENT-01, Phase 28).

Top-level layout: ``tools:`` mapping + ``sagas:`` list + ``categories:`` list + ``apps:`` dict.
Phase 32 (CATMIG-01 / D-32-01): ``categories`` and ``apps`` absorbed from arrconf.yml.
``categories`` is now the single hand-edited owner of the media category list.
``apps`` is an untyped pass-through dict emitted verbatim into generated arrconf.yml.
Phase 33 (CFGARR-01..04): ``profile_definitions`` + ``configarr`` carry the
configarr.yml generator inputs. ``configarr`` holds the pass-through skeleton
(trashGuideUrl, customFormatDefinitions, per-instance base_url/api_key/media_naming/
quality_definition). ``profile_definitions`` holds QP bodies + CF refs keyed by
configarr profile name (MULTi.VF/Anime/Family).

apps.description: App config pass-through (sonarr/radarr/prowlarr/qbittorrent/seerr/jellyfin). Emitted verbatim into generated arrconf.yml — no pydantic validation (D-32-01 YAGNI).
apps.title: Apps

categories.description: Cross-cutting media categories (lifted from arrconf.yml, D-32-01).
categories.title: Categories

category_quality_profiles.description: Maps a category's `profile` keyword (general/anime/family) to the configarr quality-profile NAME assigned to that category's movies/series by `arrconf apply`. Read-only name->id resolution at reconcile time (ADR-5 safe -- no quality-profile definition writes).
category_quality_profiles.title: Category Quality Profiles

configarr.description: configarr.yml pass-through skeleton (trashGuideUrl, customFormatDefinitions, base_url/api_key/media_naming/quality_definition per instance). Emitted verbatim; generate injects quality_profiles + custom_formats (D-33-07/08).
configarr.title: Configarr

profile_definitions.description: Reusable QP bodies keyed by configarr profile name (MULTi.VF/Anime/Family). Expanded into configarr.yml quality_profiles by 'arrconf generate' (D-33-01).
profile_definitions.title: Profile Definitions

sagas.description: Saga declarations. Schema present-but-unexercised in P28 (D-05).
sagas.title: Sagas

title: IntentConfig
